candidate_check.description: Level 1 file attachments must be blocked from being delivered.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Outlook 2016 >> Security >> Security Form Settings >> Attachment Security >> Remove file extensions blocked as Level 1 is set to "Disabled".
 
Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key: 

HKCU\software\policies\microsoft\office\16.0\outlook\security\FileExtensionsRemoveLevel1

If the registry key exists, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Outlook 2016 >> Security >> Security Form Settings >> Attachment Security >> Remove file extensions blocked as Level 1 to "Disabled".
title: Level 1 file attachments must be blocked from being delivered.
